title: Crispy Jamaican Bacon Skillet
description: A flavorful and crunchy skillet dish packed with the bold flavors of Jamaica, featuring crispy bacon and savory goodness.
instructions: 1. Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the bacon slices and cook until crispy, flipping occasionally (5-7 minutes).
3. Remove the cooked bacon from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until softened (3-4 minutes).
5. Add the sliced bell pepper to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Sprinkle the Jamaican seasoning over the vegetables and stir to combine.
7. Return the cooked bacon to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
8. Serve the crispy Jamaican bacon skillet hot, garnished with additional Jamaican seasoning if desired.
